position_bias.name: Position Bias
position_bias.description: No significant position bias detected. Judges evaluate responses fairly regardless of presentation order.

length_bias.name: Length Bias
length_bias.description: No significant length bias detected. Response length does not correlate with scores.

self_preference.name: Self-Preference
self_preference.description: Judges score same-provider models -0.6 points higher on average. Severity: moderate.

verbosity_bias.name: Verbosity Bias
verbosity_bias.description: Longer judge reasoning correlates with higher scores (r=0.17). Severity: low.
